cssr 0.1.13
  • Reference

Helper function to confirm that the argument clusters to several functions is as expected

checkClusters.Rd

Helper function to confirm that the argument clusters to several functions is as expected

Usage

checkClusters(clusters, p)

Arguments

clusters

A named list where each entry is an integer vector of indices of features that are in a common cluster, as in the output of css or formatClusters. (The length of list clusters is equal to the number of clusters.) All identified clusters must be non-overlapping, and all features must appear in exactly one cluster (any unclustered features should be in their own "cluster" of size 1).

p

The number of features; must be at least as large as the number of clusters.

Author

Gregory Faletto, Jacob Bien

On this page
